import os
from flask import Flask

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config["DEBUG"] = True
app.config["TESTING"] = False


@app.route("/api/data")
def get_data():
    return {"items": list(range(100))}


@app.route("/api/health")
def health():
    return {"status": "ok"}


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
